papers_mined.title: Pencak Silat Wikipedia Indonesian Martial Art
papers_mined.note: Pencak silat: 8 basic techniques (kuda-kuda, attitudes, steps, kembangan, buah, jurus, sapuan, guntingan); tiered belt ranking with light/medium/heavy stances and front/back/middle/side weight distribution.

papers_mined.title: 9 Teknik Dasar Pencak Silat Pemula HelloSehat
papers_mined.note: Pencak silat 9 basic techniques + kuda-kuda foundation + progressive grade-by-grade syllabus.

papers_mined.title: 6 Jenis Kuda-Kuda Pencak Silat Tirto
papers_mined.note: 6 types of kuda-kuda stances in pencak silat; stance is foundation for all subsequent techniques.

papers_mined.title: Pencak Silat Indonesian Deadly Martial Arts Steemit
papers_mined.note: Pencak silat tiered grading: white/yellow-1/yellow-2/red-3/green-madya/blue-adult belt system + teaching rights at madya level.
